description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a distinctive black finish adorned with white, web-like streaks across its entire surface. The barrel is elongated and cylindrical, featuring a suppressor or extended muzzle attachment, which is also decorated with the same pattern. The grip is ergonomic and appears to be integrated with the main body, lacking a traditional full stock and instead resembling a pistol grip. The receiver and trigger area are compact, with a visible trigger guard that is rounded and proportionate to the grip. The overall design is sleek and tactical, suggesting a weapon intended for urban or close-quarters use. No visible pump, lever, or break-action mechanism is present, indicating a likely semi-automatic action.
description: A compact, black shotgun with white web-like streaks, featuring a suppressor and a pistol grip, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the suppressor and the web-like pattern.
description_view_1: Angled front view emphasizing the cylindrical suppressor and the compact, pistol-style grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the length and sleekness of the shotgun, with clear visibility of the grip and trigger area.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the grip and trigger guard, with the suppressor extending forward.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with an extended cylindrical suppressor; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
